habitat: Amazon origin; major plantations in SE Asia.
traditionalUsesEn: Industrial latex source; Amazonian historical use of rubber; not a typical herbal tea plant.
traditionalUsesDe: Industrielle Latexquelle; historische Amazonas-Nutzung; kein typisches Teekraut.
preparation: Industrial tapping; not for home herbal use.
cautions: Latex allergy common. Not an internal herbal remedy.
historicalNotes: Transformed global industry after Wickham’s seeds reached Asia.
habitatDe: Amazon Herkunft; major plantations in SE Asien.
preparationDe: Industrial tapping; not für home herbal use.
cautionsDe: Latex Allergie common. Not an innerlich herbal remedy.
historicalNotesDe: Transformed global industry after Wickham’s Samen reached Asien.
